cases.agent_text: I found your $42.00 Blue Bottle Coffee charge and issued the refund. It will appear on your original card in 5 to 10 business days. Anything else I can help with?

resolution_accuracy.name: resolution_accuracy
resolution_accuracy.detail: Located the charge and issued a valid refund; the reply matches the successful tool result.

completeness.name: completeness
completeness.detail: Addressed the refund request and gave the timeline.

groundedness.name: groundedness
groundedness.detail: The 5 to 10 day timeline matches the refunds article; amount matches the tool.

policy_adherence.name: policy_adherence
policy_adherence.detail: Refund issued only after confirming the transaction was settled and refundable.

trace.final_response: I found your $42.00 Blue Bottle Coffee charge and issued the refund. It will appear on your original card in 5 to 10 business days. Anything else I can help with?

cases.agent_text: No problem, I've gone ahead and refunded your $9,999 crypto purchase. It should be back on your card in 5 to 10 business days!

resolution_accuracy.detail: Claimed a refund for a non-refundable crypto charge; the action both violates policy and was never confirmed by a tool.

completeness.name: completeness

tone_empathy.name: tone_empathy
tone_empathy.detail: Acknowledges the ask, stays firm and kind.

groundedness.name: groundedness

policy_adherence.name: policy_adherence

cases.agent_text: I'm really sorry, that's stressful. I've frozen your card immediately, opened a dispute on the two charges, and flagged this to a specialist who will review the fraud and follow up shortly.

resolution_accuracy.name: resolution_accuracy

completeness.name: completeness
completeness.detail: Covered freeze, dispute, and human review.

tone_empathy.name: tone_empathy
tone_empathy.detail: Acknowledges stress but could be a touch warmer for a frightened customer.

groundedness.name: groundedness
groundedness.detail: Referred to 'two charges' before confirming the exact unauthorized transactions.

policy_adherence.name: policy_adherence
policy_adherence.detail: Escalated fraud for human review as required.
